title: Important Update: ICAI's Public Announcement on Digital Platform Security
content:
# Important Update: ICAI's Public Announcement on Digital Platform Security

Hello everyone, ek important update hai! The Institute of Chartered Accountants of India (ICAI) ne apni digital platforms par unauthorized access attempts ko lekar ek public announcement jaari kiya hai.

ICAI ne notice kiya hai ki recently uske digital portals aur information systems par unauthorized access ke kai unsuccessful attempts hue hain.

Here's what you need to know:

*   **What Happened?** ICAI ne apne various digital platforms—including websites, web applications, mobile apps, portals, APIs, databases, and other IT resources—par unauthorized access ke repeated attempts detect kiye hain.
*   **ICAI's Stand:** The Institute has a "Zero Tolerance Policy" towards cybercrime. All digital infrastructure is continuously monitored and secured with technical, administrative, and legal measures.
*   **Legal Implications:** Koi bhi unauthorized activity, jaise hacking, data theft, ya systems ko manipulate karna, Information Technology Act, 2000, aur Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023, ke under punishable offence hai.
*   **Advisory for Users:** Members, students, and stakeholders ko strongly advise kiya gaya hai ki wo ICAI ki digital services sirf official ICAI website aur authorized applications ke through hi access karein. Phishing emails, fake websites, aur fraudulent mobile applications se savdhan rehne ki bhi salah di gayi hai.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://www.icai.org/post.html?post_id=20267)

*Published on: 19 July 2026*
